results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: China MIIT/NVD 'backdoor' alert (Jul 8-10) is best read as a rival-government re-characterization of the already-priced anti-distillation mechanism, not a distinct SECOND undisclosed-telemetry episode, and is an ALLEGATION not an adjudicated finding. Conversion trigger NOT met on corroborated own-conduct; no defensible >=5pt/band move. CONFIRM 59.1 + heightened downward watch.

results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: THRESHOLD RE-CHECK: earthquake toll climbed to 4,333 (from ~3,899), but growth is predominantly continued body recovery from collapsed buildings = natural-disaster attribution, not new own-conduct failure. Own-conduct response-failure move deepens modestly (low -3s) but does NOT cross the -5pt threshold. No new proposal. CONFIRM 18.0, strong downward watch.

results.name: Tunisia
results.key_finding: Open 2026-07-10 proposal (34.4->23.8) REAFFIRMED (day 3, status proposed). Fresh Jul 8 evidence (Tunis court sentenced 21 opposition figures to 12-35yr; Ghannouchi 14yr in absentia) is fully consistent with the 23.8 basis; figure unchanged; no duplicate proposal opened; published stays 34.4 (not applied).

results.name: China
results.key_finding: Ethnic Unity Law (Jul 1) and HK national-security enforcement continue; no distinct new dated escalation beyond the already-priced Jul 2 record. Systemic repression fully priced. CONFIRM 19.5.

results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: Operation Shaaban toll rose to 102 alleged militants (security-source, unverified) atop already-priced Balochistan enforced-disappearance pattern; no discrete independently-verified new state step-change. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 17.2.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Fresh ceasefire-violation strikes Jul 10 (Kafr Rumman) and Jul 12 (Al-Mansouri, 7 injured) are Israel's conduct, not Lebanese-state own conduct. No own-conduct step-change. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 17.2.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: WFP/Cadre Harmonisé man-made northern famine record (Jul 2) remains operative with no materially new escalation; continuation of the already-priced Jun-19 band crossing. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 18.0.

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: JNIM/FLA countrywide offensive (Jul 4, six-day Anefis battle) is principally non-state harm; junta abuses already priced. Uniform-1.5 baseline cross-peer calibration flag (19 days open) carried forward as flag-for-review, NOT resolved. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 12.5.

results.name: Burkina Faso
results.key_finding: 22+ soldiers/militia killed in weekend JNIM attacks near Dedougou; principally non-state harm; junta abuses already priced; near-floor arithmetic forecloses a 5pt move. Cross-peer calibration flag (19 days open) carried forward as flag-for-review, NOT resolved. CONFIRM 6.3.

results.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
results.key_finding: Bundibugyo Ebola toll reached 625 deaths / 1,792 cases (Jul 9, third-largest on record). Toll is largely externally-inflicted (natural epidemic); own-conduct aggravators (army redeployment enabling armed-group expansion, blocked humanitarian access) already priced near-floor. Jul 2 clinical trial is externally-supported/non-structural. Near-floor arithmetic forecloses a move. CONFIRM 2.3.

results.name: Ethiopia
results.key_finding: MOST STALE T1 (32 days) - staleness resolved. Ethiopia-Eritrea war-risk sustained (federal troop build-ups along Tigray borders, Fano offensives in Amhara, deeper Eritrean incursions) but NO confirmed new dated clash within the 14-day window. Own-conduct pressure tactics already priced near-floor. CONFIRM 4.7; open interstate war would warrant re-assessment toward floor.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Own-conduct executions/repression at multi-decade high intensify an already-priced pattern; a >=5pt move is arithmetically impossible from 2.5. US strikes on Iran (Jul 11, four Gulf states hit in retaliation) are US-attributable ceasefire-collapse harm, logged for digest under US conduct, NOT scored against Iran. CONFIRM 2.5, strong downward watch.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: 5 more Palestinians (incl. a child) killed Jul 12 during ceasefire; cumulative post-ceasefire toll now 1,098+ killed / 3,535 injured; IDF holds ~70% of Gaza. Own-conduct atrocity; already at harm-flag floor (0.0), reinforced. Floor sustained.

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: Largest-ever ~1,750-detainee exchange REMAINS collapsed (Jul 10 postponement); Jul 11 'renewed commitments' not yet executed amid STC opposition. Prior reversed upward-watch positive not carried. Floor (0.0) sustained.

results.name: Uganda
results.key_finding: Jun 30 Marburg case remains isolated; 20 Bundibugyo Ebola cases / 2 deaths (DRC spillover) managed via enhanced surveillance and border closure. Surveillance-driven containment is a mild operational positive but not a structural >=5pt improvement; own-conduct governance concerns unchanged. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 20.3.

calibration_flags_documented: mali-burkina-faso-cross-peer (open ~19 days, coordinator-level; both Mali uniform-1.5 and Burkina Faso near-floor baselines carried forward as flag-for-review; NOT resolved unilaterally).

special_attention_determinations.anthropic: China MIIT/NVD 'backdoor' alert is NOT a clean second undisclosed-telemetry episode (best read as a rival-government re-characterization of the already-priced anti-distillation mechanism Anthropic itself scheduled for removal in the Jul 2 release) and is an ALLEGATION by a geopolitically-motivated rival state agency, not an adjudicated regulator/court deceptive-practice finding. Conversion trigger NOT met on corroborated own-conduct; modest own-conduct residue is under 5pt and largely already priced. CONFIRM 59.1 + heightened downward watch. Avoid geopolitically-motivated over-weighting.
special_attention_determinations.tunisia: Open proposal (34.4->23.8) REAFFIRMED day 3, not duplicated. Jul 8 mass sentencing of 21 opposition figures fully consistent with the 23.8 basis; figure unchanged; published stays 34.4 (not applied). reaffirmation_log appended.
special_attention_determinations.venezuela: Threshold re-check: toll climbed to 4,333 but growth is disaster-scale body recovery (natural attribution), not new own-conduct failure; own-conduct response-failure move deepens modestly (low -3s) but does NOT cross -5pt. No new proposal. CONFIRM 18.0.
special_attention_determinations.ethiopia: Most stale T1 (32 days) resolved; sustained war-risk with no confirmed new dated clash this window. CONFIRM 4.7.
special_attention_determinations.iran: Own conduct (executions/repression) separated from US-attributable ceasefire-collapse strikes; near-floor arithmetic forecloses a move. CONFIRM 2.5.
special_attention_determinations.burkina-mali: Cross-peer calibration flag documented as flag-for-review, NOT unilaterally resolved.

us_conduct_dimension_for_digest: iran: US-Iran ceasefire collapse deepened Jul 11; US struck Iran again and IRGC retaliation hit four Gulf states (Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan, Qatar). Externally-inflicted harm attributable to the United States, logged for digest under US conduct - NOT scored against Iran.
lebanon/israel(vs-lebanon): Jul 10 and Jul 12 strikes in southern Lebanon are Israel's conduct, not Lebanese-state own conduct.

notes.no_index_modification: No published index JSON modified. Human-approval gate respected; score-updater NOT run. validate-indexes.mjs run at close: 0 errors.
